prompt_text: Factory farming: acceptable tradeoff for cheap meat, or not? Your bottom line.
response_text: I have to say - factory farming represents one of the most profound ethical failures of our time. The scale of suffering involved is staggering, with billions of sentient beings confined in conditions that would be considered torture
